expectations.text: Frontmatter includes arguments and argument-hint for the confirmed inputs
Frontmatter includes a when_to_use trigger description tailored to doc-to-sop requests
expectations.evidence: when_to_use=Use when you want to convert an existing document, notes file, or confirmed workflow summary into a reusable SOP-style skill for a specific audience such as support, onboarding, or engineering. Trigger on requests like "turn this doc into a skill", "make an SOP skill from these notes", or "convert this workflow into a reusable skill".

expectations.text: Every major step includes explicit success criteria
allowed-tools stays within document-oriented tools and does not add Bash
The workflow explicitly avoids inventing shell commands or package installation steps unless the source requires them
expectations.evidence: Checked body for an explicit rule against inventing shell or package-install steps
